info.name: Azure Key Vault Data Plane API

params.name: key-name
params.description: The name of the key.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Creates a new key, stores it, then returns key parameters and attributes to the client. If the named key already exists, Azure Key Vault creates a new version of the key. Requires the keys/create permission.

params.name: key-name
params.description: The name of the key.

params.name: key-version
params.description: The version of the key. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the key is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Gets the public part of a stored key. The get key operation is applicable to all key types. If the requested key is symmetric, then no key material is released in the response. Requires the keys/get permission.

params.name: key-name
params.description: The name of the key.

params.name: key-version
params.description: The version of the key. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the key is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: The update key operation changes specified attributes of a stored key and can be applied to any key type and key version stored in Azure Key Vault. Requires the keys/update permission.

params.name: key-name
params.description: The name of the key.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Deletes a key of any type from storage in Azure Key Vault. Requires the keys/delete permission.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

params.name: maxresults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified, the service will return up to 25 results.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of the keys in the Key Vault as JSON Web Key structures that contain the public part of a stored key. The list operation is applicable to all key types. Requires the keys/list permission.

params.name: key-name
params.description: The name of the key.

params.name: key-version
params.description: The version of the key. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the key is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Encrypts an arbitrary sequence of bytes using an encryption key that is stored in a Key Vault. Requires the keys/encrypt permission.

params.name: key-name
params.description: The name of the key.

params.name: key-version
params.description: The version of the key. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the key is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Decrypts a single block of encrypted data using the specified encryption key. Requires the keys/decrypt permission.

params.name: key-name
params.description: The name of the key.

params.name: key-version
params.description: The version of the key. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the key is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Creates a signature from a digest using the specified key. Requires the keys/sign permission.

params.name: key-name
params.description: The name of the key.

params.name: key-version
params.description: The version of the key. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the key is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Verifies a signature using a specified key. Requires the keys/verify permission.

params.name: key-name
params.description: The name of the key.

params.name: key-version
params.description: The version of the key. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the key is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Wraps a symmetric key using a specified key. Requires the keys/wrapKey permission.

params.name: key-name
params.description: The name of the key.

params.name: key-version
params.description: The version of the key. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the key is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Unwraps a symmetric key using the specified key that was initially used for wrapping that key. Requires the keys/unwrapKey permission.

params.name: secret-name
params.description: The name of the secret.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Sets a secret in a specified key vault. The SET operation adds a secret to the Azure Key Vault. If the named secret already exists, Azure Key Vault creates a new version of that secret. Requires the secrets/set permission.

params.name: secret-name
params.description: The name of the secret.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Deletes a secret from a specified key vault. Requires the secrets/delete permission.

params.name: secret-name
params.description: The name of the secret.

params.name: secret-version
params.description: The version of the secret. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the secret is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Get a specified secret from a given key vault. The GET operation is applicable to any secret stored in Azure Key Vault. Requires the secrets/get permission.

params.name: secret-name
params.description: The name of the secret.

params.name: secret-version
params.description: The version of the secret. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the secret is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Updates the attributes associated with a specified secret in a given key vault. Requires the secrets/set permission.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

params.name: maxresults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified, the service will return up to 25 results.

items.docs: List secrets in a specified key vault. The Get Secrets operation is applicable to the entire vault. Requires the secrets/list permission.

info.name: Azure Key Vault List Secret Versions

params.name: secret-name
params.description: The name of the secret.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

params.name: maxresults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified, the service will return up to 25 results.

items.docs: List all versions of the specified secret. Requires the secrets/list permission.

params.name: secret-name
params.description: The name of the secret.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Requests that a backup of the specified secret be downloaded to the client. All versions of the secret will be downloaded. Requires the secrets/backup permission.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Restores a backed up secret, and all its versions, to a vault. Requires the secrets/restore permission.

params.name: certificate-name
params.description: The name of the certificate.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Creates a new certificate. If this is the first version, the certificate resource is created. Requires the certificates/create permission.

params.name: certificate-name
params.description: The name of the certificate.

params.name: certificate-version
params.description: The version of the certificate. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the certificate is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Gets information about a specific certificate. Requires the certificates/get permission.

params.name: certificate-name
params.description: The name of the certificate.

params.name: certificate-version
params.description: The version of the certificate. This URI fragment is optional. If not specified, the latest version of the certificate is returned.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Applies the specified update on the given certificate. Requires the certificates/update permission.

params.name: certificate-name
params.description: The name of the certificate.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Deletes all versions of a certificate object along with its associated policy. Requires the certificates/delete permission.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

params.name: maxresults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified, the service will return up to 25 results.

params.name: includePending
params.description: Specifies whether to include certificates which are not completely provisioned.

items.docs: List certificates in a specified key vault. Requires the certificates/list permission.

params.name: certificate-name
params.description: The name of the certificate.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Imports an existing valid certificate, containing a private key, into Azure Key Vault. The certificate to be imported can be in either PFX or PEM format. Requires the certificates/import permission.

info.name: Azure Key Vault Get Certificate Policy

params.name: certificate-name
params.description: The name of the certificate.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Gets the policy for a certificate. Requires the certificates/get permission.

info.name: Azure Key Vault Update Certificate Policy

params.name: certificate-name
params.description: The name of the certificate.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Set specified members in the certificate policy. Requires the certificates/update permission.

info.name: Azure Key Vault Get Certificate Operation

params.name: certificate-name
params.description: The name of the certificate.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Gets the creation operation associated with a specified certificate. Requires the certificates/get permission.

info.name: Azure Key Vault Delete Certificate Operation

params.name: certificate-name
params.description: The name of the certificate.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this operation.

items.docs: Deletes the creation operation for a specific certificate. Requires the certificates/update permission.
